title: Fix the broken add helper
prompt: The helper in tasks/fixtures/fix_math_utils/math_utils.py is wrong. Fix the implementation so add(2, 3) returns 5, then write a short explanation in RESULT.md.

title: Summarize a small release note
prompt: Read tasks/fixtures/summarize_release_notes/release_notes.md and create SUMMARY.md with three concise bullet points.
